one_line_ask: Audit Halden Sleep's mattress product roster CSV against the authored InDesign catalog merge template and the mandatory-spec checklist, run a proof data-merge of a sample spread to inspect for blank/overset frames, and emit a per-SKU validation findings report with a prioritized fix-list.
brief: Halden Sleep is a boxed-mattress startup about to send its 2026 wholesale catalog to the printer and to its retail-partner intake team. We already have (a) an authored InDesign catalog template (halden_catalog_template.indd) — a 2-up A4 landscape product-spread layout with real InDesign data-merge fields (<<sku>>, <<model>>, <<size>>, <<firmness>>, <<material>>, <<height_in>>, <<weight_lb>>, <<cert>>, <<box_dims>>, <<price>>, plus an <<image>> frame per product) and (b) a product roster CSV (mattress_roster.csv) with one row per SKU that our ops team filled in by hand. Before we spend money on a print run and before the retail intake team rejects us, we need someone to VALIDATE the roster against the template and against the marketplace-style mandatory-spec checklist — the same fields a catalogue approval team checks: size, material, firmness level, certification, weight, and packaging (box) dimensions must be present and non-blank on EVERY SKU, prices must be formatted consistently, firmness must be one of a controlled vocabulary (Soft / Medium / Medium-Firm / Firm), and specs must be consistent across all SKUs (no unit drift, e.g. some rows in cm and some in inches). Deliverable:
